text:
Hi,

This new patch should work:

--- awstats-devel.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN awstats/Makefile awstats-devel/Makefile
--- awstats/Makefile	Wed Jun  7 14:27:46 2006
+++ awstats-devel/Makefile	Sun Jul 16 01:18:28 2006
@@ -5,19 +5,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/www/awstats/Makefile,v 1.32 2006/06/07 10:57:46 mich Exp
$
 #
 
-PORTNAME=	awstats
-PORTVERSION=	6.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
-PORTEPOCH=	1
+PORTNAME=	awstats-devel
+PORTVERSION=	6.6
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+MASTER_SITES=	http://awstats.sourceforge.net/files/
+DISTNAME=	awstats-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	webmaster@shopcusa.com
+MAINTAINER=	babak@farrokhi.net
 COMMENT=	Free real-time logfile analyzer to get advanced web
statistics
 
-FORBIDDEN=	Command Injection Vulnerability
-
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/Net/XWhois.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-XWhois
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
@@ -25,6 +21,13 @@
 USE_DOS2UNIX=	tools/logresolvemerge.pl
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
+AWSTATS?=	www/awstats
+PLIST_SUB=	AWSTATS=${AWSTATS}
+WWWOWN?=	www
+WWWGRP?=	www
+
+CONFLICTS=	awstats-6.*
+LATEST_LINK=	awstats-devel
 
 OPTIONS=	IPV6 "Enable IPV6 for use with IPv6 Plugin" Off
 
@@ -44,56 +47,16 @@

${WRKSRC}/tools/awstats_configure.pl

${WRKSRC}/wwwroot/cgi-bin/awstats.pl

+	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name '*.bak' -delete

- 	if (! $AwstatsFound) {

++++ tools/awstats_updateall.pl	Sun Jul 16 01:14:54 2006
+@@ -128,8 +128,8 @@

+ 	my $AwstatsFound=0;

+ 	if (! $AwstatsFound) {
